name: 7-up Cake by Becky
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter and sugar in a large bowl until creamy.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add flour to the mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Fold in the remaining Seven-up and lemon extract.
5. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees F for 60-70 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
